regulations.title: GSTR-3B Maximum Late Fee Cap
regulations.description: Maximum late fee for delayed GSTR-3B filing capped at ₹250/day subject to a maximum of ₹5000.

regulations.title: ITC Claim Tolerance Limit
regulations.description: Input Tax Credit (ITC) claim restricted to 5% of eligible credit available in GSTR-2B.

regulations.title: Standard GST Rate
regulations.description: Standard GST rate applicable to services and general goods.

regulations.title: GST Registration Turnover Threshold
regulations.description: Annual turnover above which GST registration becomes mandatory for service providers.
